title: Current Gainax toppage art Last Supper of the Angels
display_title: Current Gainax toppage art Last Supper of the Angels
wikitext:
[]: Current Gainax toppage art -- Last Supper of the Angels             Quote Post by drinian » Fri Sep 12, 2008 12:33 pm http://www.gainax.co.jp/ Rehosted for posterity:

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Fri Sep 12, 2008 12:49 pm Ok, I'll admit, that's creative. But I kinda like it...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Sep 12, 2008 2:14 pm Cute. Though, a few are missing. And Lilith's been spending way too much time around Bardi and Zer. Plus, does Kaworu and Adam being in the same image count as a Time Paradox? Incidentally, I am missing SO many of the top page illos. (And the thumbnails they archive afterwards just don't cut it...)

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Sep 12, 2008 2:42 pm I concur ^

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Fri Sep 12, 2008 3:27 pm Reichu wrote: Incidentally, I am missing SO many of the top page illos. (And the thumbnails they archive afterwards just don't cut it...)

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Fri Sep 12, 2008 5:43 pm LOL, its funny and creative. I like it. Though the whole Adam + Kaworu thing is rather unnerving.

[]:             Quote Post by pat457 » Fri Sep 12, 2008 6:23 pm Reichu wrote: Cute. Though, a few are missing. And Lilith's been spending way too much time around Bardi and Zer. Plus, does Kaworu and Adam being in the same image count as a Time Paradox?

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Fri Sep 12, 2008 6:50 pm pat457 wrote: If I might add, Kaworu being in the location where either John or Mary Magdalene (or so sayeth the Da Vinci Code) sits is quite interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Sep 12, 2008 6:58 pm pat457 wrote: Where are the others though? Outside?.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Fri Sep 12, 2008 7:25 pm Though the whole Adam + Kaworu thing is rather unnerving.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Fri Sep 12, 2008 9:04 pm ^Really? I ddin't know about that. Then again, it doesn't really matter, cause this art isn't canon or anything.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Fri Sep 12, 2008 9:35 pm @drinian: Hey thanks for the file. Good stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Fri Sep 12, 2008 11:09 pm @drinian: Yeah thanks. THe download was worth it, a lot of loltastic eva-pics right there.

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Mon Sep 29, 2008 12:50 pm Made of Effin' WIN!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Sep 29, 2008 3:15 pm Awesome. Thanks for the post!
